index.title: Index
index.description: Position of the row inside the message, determined automatically.

oneOf.title: Issued
oneOf.description: Document has been submitted pending review by the recipient.

oneOf.title: Acknowledged
oneOf.description: Received a readable invoice message that can be understood and submitted for processing by the Buyer.

oneOf.title: In Process
oneOf.description: Indicates that the referenced message or transaction is being processed.

oneOf.title: Under Query
oneOf.description: Buyer will not proceed to accept the Invoice without receiving additional information from the Seller.

oneOf.title: Rejected
oneOf.description: Buyer will not process the referenced Invoice any further. Buyer is rejecting this invoice but not necessarily the commercial transaction. Although it can be used also for rejection for commercial reasons (invoice not corresponding to delivery).

oneOf.title: Accepted / Approved
oneOf.description: Buyer has given a final approval of the invoice and the next step is payment.

oneOf.title: Paid
oneOf.description: Buyer has initiated payment, or the supplier has acknowledged receipt of payment.

oneOf.title: Error
oneOf.description: There is a technical issue with the document that has caused it to be rejected.

oneOf.title: Other
oneOf.description: Status to be determined by other codes or details listed in the line.

key.title: Key
key.description: Status Key indicates the situation of the document

date.title: Date
date.description: When this row should be considered effective

doc.title: Document
doc.description:
Document reference or details about the document that needs to be looked
at.

description.title: Description
description.description:
Description includes a human readable description that explains the
reason for the current status, if necessary.

reasons.title: Reasons
reasons.description:
Reasons define an array of reason objects that help the recipient
determine why the status was provided.

actions.title: Actions
actions.description:
Actions contains an array of actions that should be carried out by the
recipient of the message. These are suggestions.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Extensions for local or format focussed data

complements.title: Complements
complements.description: Complements contain regime/addon specific payload data.

meta.title: Meta
meta.description: Additional data specific for the source system.

bill.StatusLine.description: StatusLine represents a single row inside a message, that describes the situation of another business document.
